scripts.build: bun run --filter @gunmetal/web build && bun run --filter @dhruv2mars/gunmetal build && cargo build --workspace
scripts.check: bun run --filter @gunmetal/web lint && bun run --filter @dhruv2mars/gunmetal check && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: node --test test/*.test.js && bun run test:web && bun run --filter @dhruv2mars/gunmetal test && cargo test --workspace
